# Lealia Advisory Partners

> Independent M&A advisory firm specializing in SMEs and lower mid-market transactions in Iberia (Portugal & Spain). Services include buy-side and sell-side M&A advisory, performance improvement, corporate finance, financial modeling, and valuation.

Lealia Advisory Partners is a boutique financial advisory firm founded by experienced dealmakers Ricardo Nascimento Ferreira and Duarte Rocha Pereira, both Managing Partners. The team has successfully led 30+ transactions across Europe with deep sector expertise in the Iberian lower mid-market.

- Website: https://www.lealiaap.com
- Email: geral@lealiaap.com
- Phone: +351 935 882 323
- Location: Lisbon, Portugal
- Coverage: Portugal, Spain, Iberia, broader Europe
- Languages: English, Portuguese (PT), Spanish (ES)

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.lealiaap.com/en): Overview of Lealia Advisory Partners — independent M&A advisory for Iberian SMEs and lower mid-market.
- [About](https://www.lealiaap.com/en/about): Firm philosophy, approach, and focus on tailored advisory for SME owners across Iberia.
- [Services](https://www.lealiaap.com/en/services): Buy-side advisory, sell-side advisory, performance improvement, corporate finance, financial modeling, valuations, business plans, and feasibility studies.
- [Team](https://www.lealiaap.com/en/team): Profiles of the Managing Partners Ricardo Nascimento Ferreira and Duarte Rocha Pereira.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.lealiaap.com/en/privacy): How the firm collects, uses, and protects personal data.

## Services

- Buy-Side M&A Advisory — target identification, valuation, negotiation, and execution support for acquirers.
- Sell-Side M&A Advisory — preparation, marketing, negotiation, and closing for owners seeking liquidity or strategic exits.
- Performance Improvement — operational optimization and value-creation initiatives pre- or post-transaction.
- Corporate Finance — financial modeling, valuations, business plans, feasibility studies, and capital structuring.

## Translations

- English: https://www.lealiaap.com/en
- Português (PT): https://www.lealiaap.com/pt
- Español (ES): https://www.lealiaap.com/es
